# ── Step 1: Clean dataset ──
print("🧹 Cleaning dataset...")

df_cleaned = clean_dataset(df)

print("✅ Dataset cleaned.")

# ── Step 2: Save cleaned dataset ──
print("💾 Saving cleaned dataset to Vault as test0.csv...")

save_to_vault(df_cleaned, "test0.csv")

print("✅ File saved as test0.csv")

# ── Step 3: Confirm result ──
print("🔍 Preview of cleaned dataset:")

print(df_cleaned.head())

# ── Step 1: Remove the last 20 rows ──
print("✂️ Removing the last 20 rows...")
df_cleaned = df.iloc[:-20].copy()

# ── Step 2: Save the result to Vault ──
print("💾 Saving the updated dataset as test.csv...")
save_to_vault(df_cleaned, "test.csv")

# ── Step 3: Confirm the result ──
print("✅ Done! The dataset without the last 20 rows has been saved as test.csv.")
print(df_cleaned.tail())

# ── Step 1: Filter rows for Alexander City ──
print("🔍 Filtering data for City = 'Alexander City'...")

city_df = df[df["City"].astype(str).str.strip() == "Alexander City"].copy()

print(f"✅ Filtered rows: {len(city_df)}")


# ── Step 2: Save filtered data ──
print("💾 Saving filtered data to Vault as 'city.csv'...")

save_to_vault(city_df, "city.csv")

print("✅ File saved successfully as 'city.csv'")


# ── Step 3: Preview filtered data ──
print("📄 Preview of filtered data...")

print(city_df.head())
